---
title: "Meadow_Project"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Data Loading

```{r, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(readxl)
Artery1 <- read_excel("ArteryPropertiesForMSSP_8304_7556.xlsx", sheet = "Sheet1", col_names = FALSE)

Artery2 <- read_excel("ArteryPropertiesForMSSP_8304_7556.xlsx", sheet = "Sheet2", col_names =FALSE)
Artery3 <- read_excel("ArteryPropertiesForMSSP_8304_7556.xlsx", sheet = "Sheet3", col_names =FALSE)
```

## Transpose columns and rows

```{r}
Artery1<-t(Artery1)
Artery2<-t(Artery2)
Artery3<-t(Artery3)
first_row <- Artery1[1, ]
Artery1_data <- Artery1[-1, ]
colnames(Artery1_data) <- as.character(first_row)

first_row <- Artery2[1, ]
Artery2_data <- Artery2[-1, ]
colnames(Artery2_data) <- as.character(first_row)

first_row <- Artery3[1, ]
Artery3_data <- Artery3[-1, ]
colnames(Artery3_data) <- as.character(first_row)

```

```{r}
print(colnames(Artery1_data))
print(colnames(Artery2_data))
print(colnames(Artery3_data))
```

```{r}
library(tidyverse)

clean_mat <- function(mat) { 
  mat %>%
    as_tibble(.name_repair = "minimal") %>% 
    mutate(across(everything(), ~ { .x %>% as.character() %>% 
    str_replace_all("\\s+", "") %>% 
        str_replace("^\\.", "0.") %>%
        as.numeric() })) %>%
        as.matrix() }
```

```{r}
Artery1_data_1<- clean_mat(Artery1_data)
Artery2_data_1<- clean_mat(Artery2_data)
Artery3_data_1<- clean_mat(Artery3_data)

```

## EDA

```{r}
eda_overview <- function(df) {
  cat("===== BASIC INFO =====\n")
  cat("Rows:", nrow(df), "\n")
  cat("Cols:", ncol(df), "\n\n")
  
  cat("===== STRUCTURE =====\n")
  print(str(df))
  
  cat("\n===== SUMMARY =====\n")
  print(summary(df))
}
eda_missing <- function(df) {
  data.frame(
    variable = names(df),
    missing_rate = colMeans(is.na(df))
  ) %>% arrange(desc(missing_rate))
}

eda_missing_plot <- function(df) {
  missing_rate <- colMeans(is.na(df))
  barplot(sort(missing_rate, decreasing = TRUE),
          las = 2,
          col = "steelblue",
          main = "Missing Rate per Variable")
}
eda_numeric_summary <- function(df) {
  data.frame(
    variable = names(df),
    mean = colMeans(df, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd = apply(df, 2, sd, na.rm = TRUE),
    min = apply(df, 2, min, na.rm = TRUE),
    max = apply(df, 2, max, na.rm = TRUE),
    missing_rate = colMeans(is.na(df))
  )
}

eda_histograms <- function(df) {
  num_df <- df[sapply(df, is.numeric)]
  
  par(mfrow = c(3, 3))
  for (col in names(num_df)) {
    hist(num_df[[col]],
         main = col,
         xlab = "",
         col = "lightblue",
         border = "white")
  }
  par(mfrow = c(1, 1))
}
eda_categorical <- function(df) {
  cat_df <- df[!sapply(df, is.numeric)]
  
  for (col in names(cat_df)) {
    cat("\n===== ", col, " =====\n")
    print(table(cat_df[[col]], useNA = "ifany"))
  }
}
eda_correlation <- function(df) {
  cor(df, use = "pairwise.complete.obs")
}

eda_corr_plot <- function(df) {
  cor_matrix <- cor(df, use = "pairwise.complete.obs")
  
  image(1:ncol(cor_matrix), 1:ncol(cor_matrix), cor_matrix,
        axes = FALSE,
        xlab = "",
        ylab = "",
        main = "Correlation Heatmap")
  
  axis(1, at = 1:ncol(cor_matrix), labels = colnames(cor_matrix), las = 2)
  axis(2, at = 1:ncol(cor_matrix), labels = colnames(cor_matrix), las = 2)
  

  for (i in 1:ncol(cor_matrix)) {
    for (j in 1:ncol(cor_matrix)) {
      text(i, j, round(cor_matrix[i, j], 2), cex = 0.7)
    }
  }
}

eda_clean_data <- function(df, missing_threshold = 0.4) {
  missing_rate <- colMeans(is.na(df))
  

  df <- df[, missing_rate < missing_threshold]
  

  for (col in names(df)) {
    if (is.numeric(df[[col]])) {
      df[[col]][is.na(df[[col]])] <- median(df[[col]], na.rm = TRUE)
    }
  }
  
  return(df)
}
eda_full <- function(df) {
  cat("========== OVERVIEW ==========\n")
  eda_overview(df)
  
  cat("\n========== MISSING ==========\n")
  print(eda_missing(df))
  
  cat("\n========== NUMERIC SUMMARY ==========\n")
  print(eda_numeric_summary(df))
  
  cat("\n========== CORRELATION ==========\n")
  print(eda_correlation(df))
}

```

```{r}
Artery1_data_2 <- as.data.frame(Artery1_data_1) %>% select(-Name)
Artery2_data_2 <- as.data.frame(Artery2_data_1) %>% select(-Name)
Artery3_data_2 <- as.data.frame(Artery3_data_1) %>% select(-Name)
eda_overview(Artery1_data_2)
eda_missing(Artery1_data_2)
eda_missing_plot(Artery1_data_2)
eda_numeric_summary(Artery1_data_2)
eda_histograms(Artery1_data_2)
cor_mat1 <- eda_correlation(Artery1_data_2)
eda_corr_plot(Artery1_data_2)


eda_overview(Artery2_data_2)
eda_missing(Artery2_data_2)
eda_missing_plot(Artery2_data_2)
eda_numeric_summary(Artery2_data_2)
eda_histograms(Artery2_data_2)
cor_mat2 <- eda_correlation(Artery2_data_2)
eda_corr_plot(Artery2_data_2)


eda_overview(Artery3_data_2)
eda_missing(Artery3_data_2)
eda_missing_plot(Artery3_data_2)
eda_numeric_summary(Artery3_data_2)
eda_histograms(Artery3_data_2)
cor_mat3 <- eda_correlation(Artery3_data_2)
eda_corr_plot(Artery3_data_2)
```
```{r}
eda_count_by_name <- function(df, id_col = "Name") {
  library(dplyr)
  
  cat("===== COUNT PER NAME =====\n")
  
  res <- df %>%
    group_by(across(all_of(id_col))) %>%
    summarise(n = n(), .groups = "drop")
  
  print(res)
  
  cat("\nSummary of counts:\n")
  print(summary(res$n))
  return(res)
}

eda_group_mean <- function(df, id_col = "Name") {
  library(dplyr)
  
  cat("===== GROUP MEAN =====\n")
  
  res <- df %>%
    group_by(across(all_of(id_col))) %>%
    summarise(across(where(is.numeric),
                     ~mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE)),
              .groups = "drop")
  
  print(head(res, 20))
  
  cat("\nDimensions:\n")
  print(dim(res))
  return(res)
}

eda_group_sd <- function(df, id_col = "Name") {
  library(dplyr)
  
  cat("===== GROUP SD =====\n")
  
  res <- df %>%
    group_by(across(all_of(id_col))) %>%
    summarise(across(where(is.numeric),
                     ~sd(.x, na.rm = TRUE)),
              .groups = "drop")
  
  print(head(res, 10))
  
  cat("\nDimensions:\n")
  print(dim(res))
  return(res)
}

eda_missing_by_name <- function(df, id_col = "Name") {
  library(dplyr)
  
  cat("===== MISSING RATE BY NAME =====\n")
  
  res <- df %>%
    group_by(across(all_of(id_col))) %>%
    summarise(across(where(is.numeric),
                     ~mean(is.na(.x))),
              .groups = "drop")
  
  print(head(res, 10))
  return(res)
}

eda_boxplot_by_name <- function(df, y_var, id_col = "Name") {
  cat("===== BOXPLOT =====\n")
  cat("Variable:", y_var, "\n")
  
  formula_str <- paste(y_var, "~", id_col)
  
  boxplot(as.formula(formula_str),
          data = df,
          las = 2,
          col = "lightblue",
          main = paste("Boxplot of", y_var, "by", id_col))
}

eda_group_correlation <- function(df, var1, var2, id_col = "Name") {
  library(dplyr)
  
  cat("===== GROUP CORRELATION =====\n")
  cat("Variables:", var1, "vs", var2, "\n")
  
  res <- df %>%
    group_by(across(all_of(id_col))) %>%
    summarise(cor_value = cor(.data[[var1]],
                              .data[[var2]],
                              use = "complete.obs"),
              .groups = "drop")
  
  print(res)
  
  cat("\nSummary:\n")
  print(summary(res$cor_value))
  return(res)
}

eda_group_full <- function(df, id_col = "Name", target = NULL) {
  
  cat("========== GROUPED EDA ==========\n\n")
  
  t1=eda_count_by_name(df, id_col)
  cat("\n---------------------------------\n")
  
  t2=eda_group_mean(df, id_col)
  cat("\n---------------------------------\n")
  
  t3=eda_group_sd(df, id_col)
  cat("\n---------------------------------\n")
  
  t4=eda_missing_by_name(df, id_col)
  cat("\n---------------------------------\n")
  
  if (!is.null(target)) {
    cat("\nTarget variable distribution:\n")
    eda_boxplot_by_name(df, target, id_col)
  }
}

```

```{r}
Artery1_data_3<-as.data.frame(Artery1_data_1) 
eda_group_full(Artery1_data_3, id_col = "Name", target = "total_mean_retardance")
eda_boxplot_by_name(Artery1_data_3, y_var = "total_standard_deviation", id_col = "Name")
eda_boxplot_by_name(Artery1_data_3, y_var = "Inner_adventitia_lambda", id_col = "Name")
eda_boxplot_by_name(Artery1_data_3, y_var = "inner_adventitia_median", id_col = "Name")
eda_boxplot_by_name(Artery1_data_3, y_var = "Inner_adventitia_standard_deviation", id_col = "Name")

```

```{r}
eda_age_play <- function(df) {
  cat("===== AGE vs YEARS OF PLAY =====\n")
  
  cor_val <- cor(df$Age, df$Years_of_Play, use = "complete.obs")
  cat("Correlation:", round(cor_val, 3), "\n\n")
  
  # summary
  cat("Age summary:\n")
  print(summary(df$Age))
  
  cat("\nYears of play summary:\n")
  print(summary(df$Years_of_Play))
  
  # scatter plot
  plot(df$Age, df$Years_of_Play,
       xlab = "Age",
       ylab = "Years of Play",
       main = "Age vs Years of Play",
       col = "blue", pch = 16)
  
  abline(lm(Years_of_Play ~ Age, data = df), col = "red", lwd = 2)
  
  return(cor_val)
}
eda_age_play(Artery1_data_2)
```
